turns.user_message:
My vision for this group ❤️‍🔥 

I’d love this to become a place where the people leading consciousness in Barcelona come together — the facilitators, speakers, community builders, and visionaries creating transformation spaces.

Instead of working in isolation on separate missions, we can meet, connect, and remind each other that we’re not alone in this. It’s also a space for those who want to grow into this field or collaborate — whether you’re already leading, hosting events, or building platforms that support transformation.

Personally, I don’t want to have to move to Bali or Ibiza to find epic conscious events. I believe Barcelona can become the urban version of that — a city where consciousness and lifestyle meet, and where collaborations, co-creations, and masterminds help us all grow faster together.
